ham.subject: Your Subscription is Expiring Soon – Please Renew
ham.body:
Dear [Name],

We hope you are enjoying the features of [SaaS Product]. Your subscription is set to expire on [Date]. To continue uninterrupted service, please renew your subscription by clicking <URL>.

Thank you for choosing us.

Best regards,
The [Company] Team

spam.subject: Urgent: IT Support Ticket #98765 – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Hello [Name],

Our system has detected unusual activity on your account. As a security measure, we have temporarily suspended your access. To restore access, please verify your credentials by clicking <URL> within the next 24 hours.

Failure to comply will result in permanent lockout of your account.

Thank you,
IT Support Team
